name: Lentil Rice Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover lentils with water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 1-1 1/2 hours until tender.
2. Drain the liquid and reserve half a cup. Heat a quarter cup of water in a large pot over medium-low heat.
3. Add onion, garlic, and celery to the pot and cook until tender (about 15 minutes).
4. Stir in tomatoes, drained lentils, reserved lentil water, cooked rice, and dill weed. Mix well.
5. In a 3-quart casserole dish, sprinkle bread crumbs on the bottom. Pour the lentil-rice mixture into the dish.
6. Sprinkle the remaining bread crumbs over the top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. If making ahead of time, add 15 minutes to the cooking time.
(from The Mcdougall Plan)
